samples.text: .module-view[data-module='unit-converter'] .field:has(#convertedValue) input:disabled { color: var(--color-text); opacity: 1; -webkit-text-fill-color: var(--color-text); font-weight: 800; }

samples.text: .pipe-dimension-card--green .pipe-bar span { background: #25d96a; }.wastewater-subselect { display: grid; gap: var(--tc-gap); }

.wastewater-subselect > span { color: var(--color-muted); font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase; }.wastewater-line-selector { overflow-x: auto; overscroll-behavior-x: contain; scroll-snap-type: x proximity; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; }
